sections.title: Core Values
sections.summary: [Figure f_6_12] [Figure f_6_13] MISSION, VISION AND CORE VALUES 'T o be the reinsurer of choice in Ethiopia and our chosen market' To apprehend our corporate mission and vision, the Management and staff of Ethiopian Re  stand for the mnemonic 'ETHIOPIAN': 2 Provide  dependable  reinsurance  services  both  locally  and internationally through nurturing adequate risk capacity and using  highly  trained  professionals  and  modern  Information and Communication  Technology systems. The  Company endeavours to foster market stability, high professionalism, and advancing the business of insurance paying special attention to discharging its corporate social responsibility in the process.

sections.title: Our Credit Rating
sections.summary: Global Credit Rating (GCR) Ethio-Re's initial international and national scale strength ratings of and AA (ET), respectively with a stable outlook. Ethio-Re assures that the rating was one of the 'Big Five Pillars' of the newly designed strategic  plan 'Vision 2030', and as per its time scale.

sections.summary: [Figure f_8_23] [Figure f_8_18] Ethio-Re works hand-in-hand with key stakeholders to shape a resilient and forward-looking insurance ecosystem. child_sections.summary: [Figure f_9_26] [Figure f_9_25] Ethio-Re has joined the Nairobi Declaration on Sustainable Insurance and become the signatory member effective 2024. Accordingly, the company is striving to integrating sustainable insurance principles into its business operations.

child_sections.title: OUR THREE PHASED STRATEGIC HORIZON INCLUDES
child_sections.summary: [Figure f_12_36] [Figure f_12_38] Ethio  Re  would  strive  to  secure  business from domestic and international markets.
